rules.title: S3 bucket without server-side encryption
rules.description: S3 bucket does not have server-side encryption configured
rules.remediation: Add aws_s3_bucket_server_side_encryption_configuration resource with AES256 or aws:kms

rules.title: S3 bucket with public access
rules.description: S3 bucket allows public access via ACL
rules.remediation: Remove public ACL and add aws_s3_bucket_public_access_block

rules.title: S3 bucket missing public access block
rules.description: S3 bucket does not have public access block configured
rules.remediation: Add aws_s3_bucket_public_access_block with all settings set to true

rules.title: S3 bucket without versioning
rules.description: S3 bucket does not have versioning enabled
rules.remediation: Add aws_s3_bucket_versioning resource with enabled status

rules.title: S3 bucket without logging
rules.description: S3 bucket does not have access logging enabled
rules.remediation: Add aws_s3_bucket_logging resource to enable access logging

rules.title: Security group allows unrestricted SSH access
rules.description: Security group allows SSH (port 22) from 0.0.0.0/0
rules.remediation: Restrict SSH access to specific IP ranges or use a bastion host

rules.title: Security group allows unrestricted RDP access
rules.description: Security group allows RDP (port 3389) from 0.0.0.0/0
rules.remediation: Restrict RDP access to specific IP ranges or use a bastion host

rules.title: Security group allows unrestricted database access
rules.description: Security group allows database ports (3306, 5432, 1433, 27017) from 0.0.0.0/0
rules.remediation: Restrict database access to application security groups only

rules.title: Security group with unrestricted egress
rules.description: Security group allows all outbound traffic to 0.0.0.0/0
rules.remediation: Restrict egress to only required destinations and ports

rules.title: RDS instance without encryption
rules.description: RDS instance does not have storage encryption enabled
rules.remediation: Add storage_encrypted = true to enable encryption at rest

rules.title: RDS instance publicly accessible
rules.description: RDS instance is publicly accessible from the internet
rules.remediation: Set publicly_accessible = false and access via VPC

rules.title: RDS instance without backup retention
rules.description: RDS instance has backup retention set to 0
rules.remediation: Set backup_retention_period to at least 7 days

rules.title: RDS instance without deletion protection
rules.description: RDS instance does not have deletion protection enabled
rules.remediation: Add deletion_protection = true for production databases

rules.title: RDS instance without Multi-AZ
rules.description: RDS instance is not configured for Multi-AZ deployment
rules.remediation: Add multi_az = true for high availability

rules.title: EBS volume without encryption
rules.description: EBS volume does not have encryption enabled
rules.remediation: Add encrypted = true to enable encryption at rest

rules.title: EC2 instance with public IP
rules.description: EC2 instance is assigned a public IP address
rules.remediation: Use private subnets with NAT gateway for internet access

rules.title: IAM policy with wildcard actions
rules.description: IAM policy allows all actions (*) on resources
rules.remediation: Use least-privilege principle with specific actions

rules.title: IAM policy with wildcard resources
rules.description: IAM policy allows actions on all resources (*)
rules.remediation: Specify exact resource ARNs instead of wildcards

rules.title: CloudWatch log group without encryption
rules.description: CloudWatch log group is not encrypted with KMS
rules.remediation: Add kms_key_id to encrypt logs with KMS

rules.title: CloudWatch log group without retention
rules.description: CloudWatch log group has no retention policy (logs kept forever)
rules.remediation: Add retention_in_days to set log retention period

rules.title: Lambda function without VPC
rules.description: Lambda function is not deployed in a VPC
rules.remediation: Add vpc_config to deploy Lambda in a VPC for network isolation

rules.title: ALB not using HTTPS
rules.description: Application Load Balancer listener uses HTTP instead of HTTPS
rules.remediation: Use protocol = HTTPS and configure SSL certificate

rules.title: ALB without access logs
rules.description: Application Load Balancer does not have access logging enabled
rules.remediation: Add access_logs block to enable ALB access logging

rules.title: EKS cluster endpoint publicly accessible
rules.description: EKS cluster API endpoint is publicly accessible
rules.remediation: Set endpoint_public_access = false and use VPN or bastion

rules.title: EKS cluster without encryption
rules.description: EKS cluster secrets are not encrypted
rules.remediation: Add encryption_config block with KMS key for secrets encryption

rules.title: EKS cluster without logging
rules.description: EKS cluster control plane logging is not enabled
rules.remediation: Add enabled_cluster_log_types with api, audit, authenticator, controllerManager, scheduler

rules.title: VPC without flow logs
rules.description: VPC does not have flow logs enabled
rules.remediation: Add aws_flow_log resource to enable VPC flow logging

rules.title: SNS topic without encryption
rules.description: SNS topic is not encrypted with KMS
rules.remediation: Add kms_master_key_id to encrypt SNS messages

rules.title: SQS queue without encryption
rules.description: SQS queue is not encrypted with KMS
rules.remediation: Add kms_master_key_id to encrypt SQS messages

rules.title: Hardcoded AWS credentials
rules.description: AWS access keys are hardcoded in the configuration
rules.remediation: Use IAM roles, environment variables, or AWS Secrets Manager

rules.title: Hardcoded secret key
rules.description: AWS secret access key is hardcoded in the configuration
rules.remediation: Use IAM roles, environment variables, or AWS Secrets Manager

rules.title: DynamoDB table without encryption
rules.description: DynamoDB table is not using KMS encryption
rules.remediation: Add server_side_encryption block with enabled = true

rules.title: DynamoDB table without point-in-time recovery
rules.description: DynamoDB table does not have point-in-time recovery enabled
rules.remediation: Add point_in_time_recovery block with enabled = true

rules.title: Elasticsearch domain without encryption
rules.description: Elasticsearch domain does not have encryption at rest enabled
rules.remediation: Add encrypt_at_rest block with enabled = true

rules.title: Elasticsearch domain without node-to-node encryption
rules.description: Elasticsearch domain does not have node-to-node encryption enabled
rules.remediation: Add node_to_node_encryption block with enabled = true
